殺戮の天使 (Angels of Death)

You are Rachel, trapped in a mysterious sealed building. Navigate through dangerous floors, solve puzzles, find items, and avoid deadly traps to escape. Each floor presents environmental puzzles requiring careful observation and item combinations. Interact with objects to gather clues and unlock new areas. One wrong move could be fatal—stay alert and think carefully about your actions.

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move and climb | Space: Interact with objects | Z: Open/Close inventory | Shift: Sprint | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart
